Off Calendar Aug-14-2018 Continued To Aug-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar May-24-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Degenkolb Engineers' motion for summary judgment is denied. There are triable disputes whether Degenkolb: 1) owed a duty to plaintiff Magdaleno Merz; 2) breached a duty of care to Mr. Merz; 3) is a legal cause of Mr. Merz's claimed injuries. (Scott Depo. 9:23-10:3, 32:19-34:4; Nelson Depo. 10:11-11:13, 38:4-19; Glabe Dec. pars. 10-11, 15-16, and 27 ). Degenkolb's objections to the declaration of David Glabe are overruled. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
